description: Legal document. Inventory of estate. Dated: August 1108. Location: Cairo. Signed by Abraham b. Ḥalfōn b. Abraham and Isaac b. Abraham. Eleazar b. Araḥ assumes management of his father’s estate (including a shop) on behalf of his widowed mother and his brother, a youth. The valuation of the store one is in total 11.5 dinars (including 169 dirhams, rose marmalade, sugar, honey, and "potions"). His brother’s share, 5.75 dinars, is to be loaned to Eleazar for his investment or other use. There is no discussion of profit or loss sharing. Eleazar is charged with sustaining the widow and boy from assets that have been set aside for the purpose and upon which he has no claim. (Information from Lieberman, "A Partnership Culture," 179)
description_he: שטר: מלאי עיזבון, קהיר, אוגוסט 1108: אלעזר בן ארח מנהל חנות אביו עבור אמו האלמנה ואחיו הצעיר. שווי החנות: 11.5 דינר. חלק האח: 5.75 דינר יינתנו לאלעזר להשקעה. חתמו: אברהם בן חלפון, יצחק בן אברהם.
